channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge tosses murder conviction for man who served 25 years
item.description: A Manhattan judge has vacated the murder conviction of Henry Ruiz, who spent 25 years in prison for a 1993 murder

item.title: National Trust says it won't drop suit against Trump's ballroom after DOJ request
item.description: Preservationists say they will continue their lawsuit against President Donald Trump's planned $400 million White House ballroom

item.title: Reporters covered the correspondents' dinner shooting in real time. Conspiracy theories still spread
item.description: Conspiracy theories flooded the internet minutes after the shooting at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner attended by President Donald Trump

item.title: Court hearing for man charged with killing 2 University of South Florida students
item.description: A college dropout facing murder charges in the killings of two University of South Florida students has a hearing scheduled
